Name: Primary Field
Description: The primary entry field allows the user to enter an natural number which allows them to set the frequency per hour, day, week or month.
Dynamic Behavior:
The natural number  1 will be entered into this field by default. This is a required field.
Values : 1 to 12? TBD/Depends on product context
Default State: The natural number 1 will be entered into this field by default.
Error State: This field will need to be validated for any non natural number and will automatically switch to nearest natural number and closest to any decimal entered or should prevent users from entering any decimal or negative values

Name: Primary frequency Dropdown
Description: This dropdown allows the user to select between hour, day, week and month options for overall frequency.
Dynamic Behavior:
If the dropdown selection is “hour” the time dropdown (3) is removed from the widget. 
Values : “Hour”, “Day”, “Week”, “Month”
Default State: By default the dropdown will display “Days”.

Name: Time Dropdown
Description: This dropdown allows the user to select a specific time when the frequency should be triggered.
Dynamic Behavior:
If the freqency dropdown (2) selection is “hour” the time dropdown (3) is removed from the widget. 
Values : “10:00”, “10:30”, “11:00” and so on...
TBD/Depends on product context
Default State: By default the time picker will be set to 10:00 AM and set to the user’s cluster timezone.

Name: Day selection Cluster
Description: This dropdown allows the user to select a specific day when the frequency should be triggered.
Dynamic Behavior:
This cluster only appears when the user has selected the “week” option from the primary frequency dropdown (2)Multiple days can be selected
Values : Single or multiple selection from
M, T, W, Th, F, Sa, Su

Name: Month selection: Dropdown Input1
Description: This input allows the user to pick the type of monthly frequency they want to set, IF the user has selected the “month” input from the primary frequency dropdown (2)
Dynamic Behavior:
This input allows the user to pick the type of monthly frequency they want to set, IF the user has selected the “month” input from the primary frequency dropdown (2)
Values : “By date”, “On the”

Name: Month selection: Dropdown Input2A
Description: This input allows the user to set monthly frequency in context of days of the week, If the user has selected the “month” input from the primary frequency dropdown (2)
Dynamic Behavior:
This input only appears when the user has selected “On the” option from the Month selection: Dropdown Input1 (5)
Values : 
Dropdown 1: “First”, “Second”, “Third”, “Fourth”, “Last”
Dropdown 2: “Monday”, “Tuesday”, “Wednesday”, “Thursday”, “Friday”, “Saturday”, “Sunday”, “Day”

Name: Month selection: Text Input2B
Description: This input allows the user to set monthly frequency in context of dates of the month, IF the user has selected the “month” input from the primary frequency dropdown (2)
Dynamic Behavior:
This input only appears when the user has selected “By date” option from the Month selection: Dropdown Input1 (5)
Values : Numbers between 1 to 31, separated by commas
Default State: This input will be empty by default, this is a required field.
Error State: The enter dates field requires at least one entry to validate this widget.
